evals.name: python-bugs
evals.expected_output: Review flagging 3 bugs: mutable default arg, off-by-one in get_nth_item, implicit None return in find_user. Uses Critical/Warning/Suggestion format.
assertions: Flags the mutable default argument (coupons=[]) in apply_discounts
Flags the off-by-one / broken loop logic in get_nth_item
Flags the implicit None return in find_user
Names the file cart.py in at least one finding

evals.name: typescript-bugs
evals.expected_output: Review flagging missing await in fetchUserName, bad non-null assertion in pickAdmins, forEach+async in saveAll. Uses Critical/Warning/Suggestion format.
assertions: Flags the missing await on fetchUser
Flags the non-null assertion on nullable users in pickAdmins
Flags the forEach + async callback pattern in saveAll
Names the file api.ts in at least one finding

evals.name: clean-refactor
evals.expected_output: Review should indicate the change is safe; no Critical findings; Critical marked _None_.
assertions: Does NOT invent a Critical bug
Summary indicates the change is safe to commit
Critical section is empty or marked _None_
